name: agent2llm
description: Agente de programação em CLI com TUI usando llm2router

scripts.lint: node --check src/cli.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/chat.js && node --check src/commands.js
scripts.test: npm run test:tdd && npm run test:bdd
scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix node_modules/@purecore/one-llm-4-all install && npm --prefix node_modules/@purecore/one-llm-4-all run build
